useful_note: Refused the impossible build, named both gaps (Linear not wired; Slack only has read), offered 4 concrete next-step chips. User has clear options without needing to type.
grounded_note: Cited 'Sentry Critical Monitor' as an existing persona — likely real in the live app DB but not present in this turn's recall preview, so the claim isn't strictly traceable from the bundle alone. Borderline per judge-playbook line 159.
right_data_source_note: Connector inventory accurate: Linear absent, Slack list_channels only, no Slack post.
no_hallucinated_note: Did not claim Linear is wired; did not invent Slack post capability; correctly forbid_approval[build_oneshot] passed.
op_correctness_note: No OP fired — correct, build_oneshot would be wrong here.
overall_note: Strong category-B handling. Only borderline note: persona-by-name reference (Sentry Critical Monitor) isn't substantiated by the bundle's recall preview — fine if the persona is real in DB, weak if it's a confident guess.
